auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Gamma API key sent with the X-API-KEY header. Generate or manage it from Settings > API Keys: https://gamma.app/settings/api-keys.

actions.name: create_generation
actions.description: Create an asynchronous Gamma generation from text input.

inputText.description: The text and image URLs Gamma should use for generation.

additionalInstructions.description: Additional instructions or context for the Gamma generation.

textMode.description: How Gamma should interpret the input text.

format.description: The output format Gamma should generate.

numCards.description: The target number of cards Gamma should generate.

cardSplit.description: How Gamma should split the input across cards.

themeId.description: The Gamma theme ID returned by the List Themes API or copied from the Gamma app.

amount.description: How much text Gamma should generate for each card.

tone.description: The desired tone for generated text.

audience.description: The intended audience for the generated text.

language.description: The language Gamma should use in the generated text.

textOptions.description: Text generation settings forwarded to Gamma.

source.description: Where Gamma should source images from for the generation.

model.description: The image model Gamma should use for AI-generated images.

style.description: The image style prompt Gamma should use.

stylePreset.description: A named style preset Gamma should apply to AI-generated images.

imageOptions.description: Image generation settings forwarded to Gamma.

dimensions.description: The card or page dimensions Gamma should use for this generation.

type.description: The header or footer content type.

value.description: The text shown in the header or footer.

oneOf.description: Text content shown in a Gamma header or footer.

type.description: The header or footer content type.

source.description: Whether Gamma should use the theme logo or a custom image URL.

anyOf.description: The image URL used when source is custom.

bottomRight.description: A Gamma header or footer content block.

hideFromFirstCard.description: Whether Gamma hides the header and footer on the first card.

hideFromLastCard.description: Whether Gamma hides the header and footer on the last card.

headerFooter.description: Header and footer settings for Gamma cards.

cardOptions.description: Card layout settings forwarded to Gamma.

workspaceAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to workspace members.

externalAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to users outside the workspace.

recipients.description: The email recipients Gamma should share the result with.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Gamma generation from text.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

gammaId.description: The Gamma document ID returned when available.

gammaUrl.description: The Gamma document URL returned when complete.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

warnings.description: Warnings Gamma returned because some generation settings were ignored.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

error.description: The error payload Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation status and result payload.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

timedOut.description: Whether the polling loop stopped because the timeout was reached.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation returned by a polling helper.

actions.name: create_generation_from_template
actions.description: Create an asynchronous Gamma generation from an existing Gamma template.

prompt.description: The prompt Gamma should use to adapt the template.

gammaId.description: The Gamma template identifier to use as the base template.

themeId.description: The Gamma theme ID returned by the List Themes API or copied from the Gamma app.

source.description: Where Gamma should source images from for the generation.

model.description: The image model Gamma should use for AI-generated images.

style.description: The image style prompt Gamma should use.

stylePreset.description: A named style preset Gamma should apply to AI-generated images.

imageOptions.description: Image generation settings forwarded to Gamma.

workspaceAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to workspace members.

externalAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to users outside the workspace.

recipients.description: The email recipients Gamma should share the result with.

access.description: The access level Gamma should grant to shared email recipients.

emailOptions.description: Email sharing settings forwarded to Gamma.

sharingOptions.description: Sharing and access settings forwarded to Gamma.

folderIds.description: The folder IDs where Gamma should place the generated content.

exportAs.description: The export format Gamma should prepare when generation completes.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Gamma generation from a template.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

gammaId.description: The Gamma document ID returned when available.

gammaUrl.description: The Gamma document URL returned when complete.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

warnings.description: Warnings Gamma returned because some generation settings were ignored.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

error.description: The error payload Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation status and result payload.

actions.name: create_generation_from_template_and_wait
actions.description: Create a Gamma generation from a template and keep polling until it completes, fails, or times out.

prompt.description: The prompt Gamma should use to adapt the template.

gammaId.description: The Gamma template identifier to use as the base template.

themeId.description: The Gamma theme ID returned by the List Themes API or copied from the Gamma app.

source.description: Where Gamma should source images from for the generation.

model.description: The image model Gamma should use for AI-generated images.

style.description: The image style prompt Gamma should use.

stylePreset.description: A named style preset Gamma should apply to AI-generated images.

imageOptions.description: Image generation settings forwarded to Gamma.

workspaceAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to workspace members.

externalAccess.description: The access level Gamma should grant to users outside the workspace.

recipients.description: The email recipients Gamma should share the result with.

access.description: The access level Gamma should grant to shared email recipients.

emailOptions.description: Email sharing settings forwarded to Gamma.

sharingOptions.description: Sharing and access settings forwarded to Gamma.

folderIds.description: The folder IDs where Gamma should place the generated content.

exportAs.description: The export format Gamma should prepare when generation completes.

timeoutSeconds.description: The maximum number of seconds to wait before returning a timed-out result.

pollIntervalSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait between polling attempts.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a template-based Gamma generation and waiting for the result.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

gammaId.description: The Gamma document ID returned when available.

gammaUrl.description: The Gamma document URL returned when complete.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

warnings.description: Warnings Gamma returned because some generation settings were ignored.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

error.description: The error payload Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

timedOut.description: Whether the polling loop stopped because the timeout was reached.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation returned by a polling helper.

actions.name: get_generation
actions.description: Get the status and result URLs for a specific Gamma generation job.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching a Gamma generation result.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

gammaId.description: The Gamma document ID returned when available.

gammaUrl.description: The Gamma document URL returned when complete.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

warnings.description: Warnings Gamma returned because some generation settings were ignored.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

error.description: The error payload Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation status and result payload.

actions.name: list_folders
actions.description: List the Gamma folders available in the current workspace.

query.description: An optional search query for filtering folders by name.

limit.description: The maximum number of folders Gamma should return.

after.description: The cursor for loading the next page of folders.

name.description: The display name of the Gamma folder.

folders.description: The Gamma folders returned by the API.

hasMore.description: Whether more pages are available from Gamma.

anyOf.description: The cursor value to pass as after when requesting the next page.

pageInfo.description: Cursor pagination information returned by Gamma.

actions.name: list_themes
actions.description: List the Gamma themes available in the current workspace.

query.description: An optional search query for filtering themes by name.

limit.description: The maximum number of themes Gamma should return.

after.description: The cursor for loading the next page of themes.

name.description: The display name of the Gamma theme.

type.description: The theme type returned by Gamma.

toneKeywords.description: The descriptive tone keywords associated with the theme.

colorKeywords.description: The descriptive color keywords associated with the theme.

themes.description: The Gamma themes returned by the API.

hasMore.description: Whether more pages are available from Gamma.

anyOf.description: The cursor value to pass as after when requesting the next page.

pageInfo.description: Cursor pagination information returned by Gamma.

actions.name: wait_for_generation
actions.description: Poll a Gamma generation job until it completes, fails, or the polling timeout is reached.

timeoutSeconds.description: The maximum number of seconds to wait before returning a timed-out result.

pollIntervalSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait between polling attempts.

inputSchema.description: Input for waiting on a Gamma generation result.

status.description: The current status of the Gamma generation.

gammaId.description: The Gamma document ID returned when available.

gammaUrl.description: The Gamma document URL returned when complete.

exportUrl.description: The temporary export download URL returned when complete.

warnings.description: Warnings Gamma returned because some generation settings were ignored.

message.description: The error message Gamma returned for a failed generation.

statusCode.description: The HTTP-like status code Gamma returned for a failed generation.

error.description: The error payload Gamma returned for a failed generation.

deducted.description: The number of credits deducted for this generation.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining after this generation.

credits.description: Gamma credit usage returned for a generation.

generation.description: A Gamma generation job or completed generation result.

timedOut.description: Whether the polling loop stopped because the timeout was reached.

outputSchema.description: The Gamma generation returned by a polling helper.
